questions: vul kore beshi pay kore felsi
refund er jonno ki korte hobe?
bill ta thik na, check korun
service kharap chilo tai refund chai
answers: Refund er jonno apnar complaint ar billing details niye amra review korbo. ISP Digital e refund process normally 7-10 working days e complete hoy. Apnar payment method e refund fire jabe.
Overbilling hoye thakle amra khub sorry! Apnar account details share korun, amra immediately billing check korbo. Vul charge confirm hole ISP Digital same day account credit kore dey.
Duplicate payment hoye thakle tension neben na! Payment proof (screenshot/receipt) ta amader pathiyen. ISP Digital 3-5 working days er moddhe duplicate amount refund kore dey.
Refund bKash, Nagad, ba apnar bank account e ashbe — je method e pay korechilen sei method e return hobe. Refund process start hoye gele apnake SMS e janabo.
Bill adjustment er jonno 09612-000000 e call korun ba app theke request submit korun. Amader billing team 24 ghontar moddhe review kore adjustment kore dibe.
Connection cancel korle remaining days er pro-rata refund paben ISP Digital theke. Cancellation form e refund preference select korun — 15 working days e process hobe.
Service downtime er jonno compensation hisebe ISP Digital automatic bill credit dey. Jodi 24 ghontar beshi downtime thake, apnar next bill e credit adjust hobe.
Refund claim korte apnar customer ID, payment receipt, ar problem er details niye amader support e contact korun. ISP Digital transparent billing e believe kore — kono hidden charge nai!
Apnar refund request receive hoyeche ar processing e ache. Refund amount apnar account e credit hobe 7-10 working days er moddhe. ISP Digital quick refund processing ensure kore.
Extra charge bill e dekhle alarm howar dorkar nai — oiTA hote pare installation fee, late fee, ba add-on service er charge. Details er jonno apnar itemized bill check korun ba amader ke call korun.
